speaker: speaker1
text: Amelia , could you spare a few minutes ?

speaker: speaker1
text: well , I wanted to let you know that I've put in my notice .

speaker: speaker1
text: it's complicated . But basically it boils down to one thing . This company is downsizing and I can't continue working for a company that may let me go .

speaker: speaker2
text: but surely they won't fire you ! You're one of the most experienced managers here !

speaker: speaker1
text: well , to be honest , there's another reason . I've got a better offer .

speaker: speaker2
text: well that's great news ! Congratulations ! Where will you be located ?

speaker: speaker1
text: the head office is in New York , but I'll be dealing with overseas companies and flying to this side of the world from time to time .

speaker: speaker2
text: it'll be sad to see you go , but it sounds like you're found yourself a great opportunity .

speaker: speaker1
text: I have . I feel lucky . I look forward to dealing with overseas companies and at the same time having a chance to use English more .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm sorry to bring this up , but would it be possible for you to write me a letter of recommendation before you go ?

speaker: speaker1
text: of course I can . In fact , if there are other job opportunities at this new company , I'll recommend you personally .
